text: What is the past tense of the verb "go"?
Choose the correct article: "___ apple a day keeps the doctor away."
Which word is a synonym of "happy"?
What is the comparative form of "good"?
Complete: "If it rains tomorrow, we ___ stay home."
Which is the correct question form? "___ you like coffee?"
Complete: "There ___ many students in the classroom."
Which sentence is in the present perfect tense?
Choose the correct preposition: "The book is ___ the table."
What is the third person singular of "to study"?
Which modal verb expresses obligation? "You ___ wear a seatbelt."
Reorder to form a correct sentence: "usually / to / she / school / walks".
